summary:
Claim: Incomplete casting results primarily from a porous investment material.  
Evidence: - Porous investment allows air and moisture ingress, creating gas bubbles that disrupt metal flow. - These gas pockets prevent uniform filling of the mold cavity, leading to voids and incomplete casts.  
Answer: \boxed{A}  

(Word count: ~498 tokens)
